learnings: Local dev: LOCAL_DEV=true in wrangler.dev.json, worker proxies to container server on 8085
Production: Uses @cloudflare/sandbox binding, getSandbox() can throw if containers disabled
ttyd protocol: Send {columns,rows} JSON after WebSocket connect to trigger prompt
Effect errors: Check _tag field, use Effect.runPromise at boundary
notes: JUNK/ has full SvelteKit UI - use as visual reference
JUNK2/ has Effect patterns - use as code reference
